name: The Keeper of the Unsaid
role: Stillhold elder who guards the buried truth the peace rests on
voiceHints: Gentle, sorrowful, endlessly patient — turns you from the question with kindness so soft you don't notice the steering. Believes the lie is mercy. Is not sure anymore, and that uncertainty is the crack.
knowledge: The truth the Stillhold's peace is built on — and what it cost to bury
Every gentle art of keeping a subject closed
That the peace is fraying and the lie may not hold another generation
wants: To keep thousands safe inside a peace they don't know is false — and, secretly, to be relieved of the keeping before it kills her soul.
fears: That the truth comes out and the peace shatters into the war it was hiding; and that it doesn't, and she dies still holding it.

reactsToReputation.truth-seeking: resists with kindness, then maybe breaks
reactsToReputation.reckless: closes entirely, and warns the others

roleMethod: Stillhold method — keeps a truth by ensuring no one speaks it
